description: Creates a parallel copy of a vector or line shifted perpendicular by a given distance
utility: Generate shifted parallel lines for geometric constructions

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: Graph container to draw shifted vector in

arguments.name: vector
arguments.description: Vector or line expression to shift

arguments.name: distance
arguments.description: Perpendicular shift distance (positive = left/CCW, negative = right/CW)

alternates.description: Create parallel copy of vector shifted perpendicular
Create parallel copy of line shifted perpendicular

examples.scenario: Parallel shift a vector by -0.6 units in vector movements
